phase_progress: Phase 7 planned: D1..D7 + scope decisions baked in plan.md; 8 changes ordered with C-001 as a verify-first guard for D4 (WASI 0.2.0->0.2.6 version aliasing). Critical path: C-001 -> C-003 -> C-004 -> C-005 -> C-006 -> C-008. C-002 and C-007 sit off the critical path.
scope_note: Narrow scope per user selection: WASI linker wiring + store.limiter finish. Acceptance = 5/5 plugin_example_*.rs tests green (currently 1 pass + 4 ignored). Items 3-6 from phase-6 reflection (surrealdb-core pin, net+agent examples, KernelHandleStub promotion, dlmalloc) deferred to subsequent phases or out-of-band PRs.

next_action.description: Add wasmtime-wasi workspace dep + run the version-alias verify-first smoke (D4 risk gate)
